zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Campbell於1507年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度時，她的父親Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr37歲，母親Isobel Wallace of Craigie21歲。她於1524年與Robert Crawford在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年5月30日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Campbell于1507年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度时，她的父亲Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr37岁，母亲Isobel Wallace of Craigie21岁。她于1524年与Robert Crawford在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年5月30日在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Campbell was born in 1507, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, was 37 and her mother, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, was 21. She married Robert Crawford in 1524, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 30 May 1564, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Campbell est née en 1507, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Crawford en 1524, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 mai 1564, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Campbell 1507 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr 37 und ihre Mutter Isobel Wallace of Craigie 21. Sie hat 1524 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Robert Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Mai 1564 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Campbell è nata il nel 1507 nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert Crawford nel 1524, nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 maggio 1564, nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Campbellが1507年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで生まれた時，父Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayrは37歳，母Isobel Wallace of Craigieは21歳であった。1524年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーでRobert Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1564年5月30日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Campbell(이)가 1507년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isobel Wallace of Craigie(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 Robert Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 5월 30일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Campbell nasceu em 1507, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Crawford em 1524, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de maio de 1564, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Campbell родилась в 1507 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isobel Wallace of Craigie, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Crawford в 1524 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 мая 1564 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Campbell nació en 1507, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert Crawford en 1524, en Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1564, en Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años.
